Chess library for board management, game state, move operations, piece handling, and related tests.

## Folders
- **[chesslib](chesslib/README.md)**: Chess library with implementations for board management, game state, move operations, and piece handling.

## Files
- **[tests.c](tests.c.md)**: Tests for a C-based chess implementation, covering various chess components and functionalities.
- **[tests.h](tests.h.md)**: Testing functions for various chess components, including moves, boards, and piece movements.
